tagline: Digital illustrations, character art, and personal style.
bio: Mirlian is a digital artist exploring illustration, animation, and 3D modeling while sharing progress publicly.

faq.question: How can I contact the artist?
faq.answer: Email azuradoesart@gmail.com or message through VGen.

faq.question: Where can I see more works?
faq.answer: Check the portfolio gallery on this site and social pages.
